name: Vascular-aging review frames MitoQ as promising but translationally unresolved
summary: Review of vascular-aging pharmacology that discusses mitochondrial antioxidants including MitoQ and emphasizes translational bottlenecks, surrogate endpoints, and precision trial design.
statement: Review of vascular-aging pharmacology that discusses mitochondrial antioxidants including MitoQ and emphasizes translational bottlenecks, surrogate endpoints, and precision trial design.
population_or_model: Review-level synthesis across NAD, redox, supplementation, or vascular-aging literature
caveats: Review context should not be treated as new primary efficacy evidence.
The record supports boundary and source-completeness assessment rather than stage upgrade.
